tasks.subject: Task 1: InlineCheckbox 노드 스켈레톤 + 기본 NodeView
tasks.description:
**Goal:** atomic inline 노드 `inlineCheckbox` 정의 + 정적 NodeView. 토글/input/paste 는 후속 태스크.

**Files:**
- Create: `app/src/lib/editor/inlineCheckbox/node.ts`
- Create: `app/src/lib/editor/inlineCheckbox/index.ts`
- Create: `app/tests/unit/editor/inlineCheckbox/node.test.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Node.create with name='inlineCheckbox', atom=true, inline=true, selectable=true, marks=''
- attrs { checked: {default: false} }
- parseHTML / renderHTML for span.tomboy-inline-checkbox
- NodeView with data-checked + contentEditable=false + update() refresh
- TomboyInlineCheckbox = [InlineCheckbox] exported
- schema + NodeView tests PASS

**Verify:** `cd app && npm run test -- tests/unit/editor/inlineCheckbox/node.test.ts`

```json:metadata
{"files":["app/src/lib/editor/inlineCheckbox/node.ts","app/src/lib/editor/inlineCheckbox/index.ts","app/tests/unit/editor/inlineCheckbox/node.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd app && npm run test -- tests/unit/editor/inlineCheckbox/node.test.ts","acceptanceCriteria":["Node.create with name='inlineCheckbox', atom=true, inline=true, selectable=true, marks=''","attrs { checked: {default:false} }","parseHTML matches span.tomboy-inline-checkbox via data-checked","renderHTML emits span with class + data-checked","NodeView creates span dom with data-checked, contentEditable=false, update() refreshes data-checked","TomboyInlineCheckbox = [InlineCheckbox] exported","schema + NodeView unit tests PASS"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Archiver 읽기 — [ ]/[x] 텍스트 → 노드 split
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `noteContentArchiver.ts` 의 `appendInlineNodes` 가 텍스트 안의 `\[([ xX])\]` 패턴을 `inlineCheckbox` 노드로 split. 좌우 텍스트 mark 보존, 노드는 mark 받지 않음.

**Files:**
- Modify: `app/src/lib/core/noteContentArchiver.ts` (정규식 + splitter L52-92, appendInlineNodes L377-405, scanForNextRunMarks L160-165)
- Create: `app/tests/unit/core/archiverInlineCheckbox.test.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- INLINE_CHECKBOX_SPLIT_RE = /\[([ xX])\]/g
- splitInlineCheckboxesInText helper mirrors footnote splitter
- appendInlineNodes chains footnote + checkbox splits
- scanForNextRunMarks closes marks when encountering inlineCheckbox
- [x]/[X] → checked:true, [ ] → checked:false
- mark-crossing test, consecutive test, coexists with footnote

**Verify:** `cd app && npm run test -- tests/unit/core/archiverInlineCheckbox.test.ts`

```json:metadata
{"files":["app/src/lib/core/noteContentArchiver.ts","app/tests/unit/core/archiverInlineCheckbox.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd app && npm run test -- tests/unit/core/archiverInlineCheckbox.test.ts","acceptanceCriteria":["INLINE_CHECKBOX_SPLIT_RE = /\\[([ xX])\\]/g constant","splitInlineCheckboxesInText helper mirrors splitFootnotesInText pattern","appendInlineNodes chains footnote split + checkbox split","scanForNextRunMarks returns [] when encountering inlineCheckbox","[x]/[X] → checked:true, [ ] → checked:false","mark-crossing splits surrounding text but node receives no marks","consecutive [ ][x] produces two nodes","coexists with footnote markers"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Archiver 쓰기 — 노드 → [ ]/[x] 텍스트
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 직렬화 시 inlineCheckbox 노드를 [ ]/[x] 텍스트로 출력. getPlainText 도 동일.

**Files:**
- Modify: app/src/lib/core/noteContentArchiver.ts (top-level serialize L228-240, serializeInlineContent L720-734, getPlainText L916-922)
- Modify: app/tests/unit/core/archiverInlineCheckbox.test.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Both serialize loops emit [ ]/[x] after closeAll() for inlineCheckbox
- getPlainText returns [ ]/[x]
- Round-trip simple [ ] preserved
- Round-trip mark-crossing splits one bold into two
- Nullable attrs.checked serializes as [ ]

**Verify:** `cd app && npm run test -- tests/unit/core/archiverInlineCheckbox.test.ts`

```json:metadata
{"files":["app/src/lib/core/noteContentArchiver.ts","app/tests/unit/core/archiverInlineCheckbox.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd app && npm run test -- tests/unit/core/archiverInlineCheckbox.test.ts","acceptanceCriteria":["serializeContent top-level loop emits [ ]/[x] after closeAll() for inlineCheckbox","serializeInlineContent writeTextNode emits [ ]/[x] after closeAll()","getPlainText returns [ ]/[x] for inlineCheckbox","XML [ ] round-trips through JSON back to XML [ ]","mark-crossing round-trip splits one bold into two bold spans around the checkbox","null/undefined attrs.checked serializes as [ ]"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Input rule — [ ]/[x] 타이핑 → 노드
tasks.description:
**Goal:** [ ]/[x]/[X] 본문 타이핑 → 즉시 노드 변환. 제목 라인 차단.

**Files:**
- Modify: app/src/lib/editor/inlineCheckbox/node.ts (InputRule import + addInputRules)
- Modify: app/tests/unit/editor/inlineCheckbox/node.test.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- InputRule find /\[([ xX])\]$/
- [x]/[X] → checked:true; [ ] → checked:false
- Title line idx(0)===0 → return null
- Body conversion + title-no-op tests

**Verify:** `cd app && npm run test -- tests/unit/editor/inlineCheckbox/node.test.ts`

```json:metadata
{"files":["app/src/lib/editor/inlineCheckbox/node.ts","app/tests/unit/editor/inlineCheckbox/node.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd app && npm run test -- tests/unit/editor/inlineCheckbox/node.test.ts","acceptanceCriteria":["InputRule with find: /\\[([ xX])\\]$/","[x] / [X] → checked:true; [ ] → checked:false","Title line (idx(0)===0) returns null (no conversion)","Body paragraph [ ] typing → single inlineCheckbox node","Body paragraph [x] typing → checked node","Title line [ ] remains as text"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Paste transform — fragment 안 텍스트 split
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Paste slice 안의 [ ]/[x] 텍스트를 노드로 split. 제목 destination skip. 중첩 fragment 재귀.

**Files:**
- Modify: app/src/lib/editor/inlineCheckbox/node.ts (Plugin/Slice/Fragment imports + addProseMirrorPlugins + 헬퍼)
- Modify: app/tests/unit/editor/inlineCheckbox/node.test.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- addProseMirrorPlugins registers paste plugin
- transformPasted skips when destination is title line
- Fragment text split, surrounding text retains marks
- Recurses into nested fragments
- 3 test cases

**Verify:** `cd app && npm run test -- tests/unit/editor/inlineCheckbox/node.test.ts`

```json:metadata
{"files":["app/src/lib/editor/inlineCheckbox/node.ts","app/tests/unit/editor/inlineCheckbox/node.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd app && npm run test -- tests/unit/editor/inlineCheckbox/node.test.ts","acceptanceCriteria":["addProseMirrorPlugins registers paste plugin","transformPasted returns slice unchanged when destination is title line","Fragment text split by /\\[([ xX])\\]/g — inlineCheckbox nodes inserted","Surrounding text retains original marks; nodes carry no marks","Recurses into nested fragments (bulletList → listItem → paragraph)","Test: body paste transforms; title-line paste skips; nested list paste transforms"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: 클릭 토글 — NodeView mousedown → setNodeAttribute
tasks.description:
**Goal:** NodeView 클릭 시 checked 토글. setNodeAttribute 로 undo 가능. mousedown preventDefault.

**Files:**
- Modify: app/src/lib/editor/inlineCheckbox/node.ts (addNodeView mousedown)
- Modify: app/tests/unit/editor/inlineCheckbox/node.test.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- mousedown listener with preventDefault
- setNodeAttribute dispatched via view.dispatch
- update() reflects new state
- undo restores
- 2 test cases

**Verify:** `cd app && npm run test -- tests/unit/editor/inlineCheckbox/node.test.ts`

```json:metadata
{"files":["app/src/lib/editor/inlineCheckbox/node.ts","app/tests/unit/editor/inlineCheckbox/node.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd app && npm run test -- tests/unit/editor/inlineCheckbox/node.test.ts","acceptanceCriteria":["dom mousedown listener calls preventDefault","handler reads current attrs.checked from view.state.doc.nodeAt(pos)","handler dispatches tr.setNodeAttribute(pos, 'checked', next)","update() reflects new attrs.checked via data-checked DOM attr","editor.commands.undo() restores prior state","PM doc reflects new attrs"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: 하위 소비자 — copyFormatted + parseSchedule
tasks.description:
**Goal:** copyFormatted 4 serializer + parseSchedule inlineText 가 inlineCheckbox 처리.

**Files:**

- mdNode emits [ ]/[x]

**Verify:** `cd app && npm run test -- tests/unit/editor/copyFormatted.test.ts tests/unit/schedule/`

```json:metadata
{"files":["app/src/lib/editor/copyFormatted.ts","app/src/lib/schedule/parseSchedule.ts","app/tests/unit/editor/copyFormatted.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd app && npm run test -- tests/unit/editor/copyFormatted.test.ts tests/unit/schedule/","acceptanceCriteria":["getTextNodes returns [ ] / [x] for inlineCheckbox (covers plain + structured)","htmlNode emits <input type=\"checkbox\" disabled> or disabled checked","mdNode emits [ ] / [x]","parseSchedule.inlineText returns [ ] / [x]","6 new copyFormatted test cases (plain, structured, markdown, html × 2 states)","regression: existing copyFormatted/schedule tests still PASS"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: TomboyEditor 통합 + CSS + 전체 회귀
tasks.description:
**Goal:** TomboyEditor.svelte 에 extension 등록 + CSS. 전체 회귀 통과.

**Files:**
- Modify: app/src/lib/editor/TomboyEditor.svelte (import + extensions + <style>)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- TomboyInlineCheckbox imported + spread into extensions
- CSS .tomboy-inline-checkbox (14px, border, vertical-align)
- [data-checked='true'] selector with check SVG bg
- ::before pseudo for mobile hit-area (24×24)
- npm run check: no new errors
- npm run test: all PASS

**Verify:** `cd app && npm run check && npm run test`

```json:metadata
{"files":["app/src/lib/editor/TomboyEditor.svelte"],"verifyCommand":"cd app && npm run check && npm run test","acceptanceCriteria":["TomboyInlineCheckbox imported and ...spread into extensions array","CSS .tomboy-inline-checkbox sized 14px, border 1px, vertical-align baseline","[data-checked='true'] selector applies filled background + white ✓ SVG","::before pseudo extends touch area to 24×24 px for mobile","npm run check passes with no new errors","npm run test passes all tests"]}
```
